bridge-type.label: ESPSomfy-RTS Controller
bridge-type.description: An ESPSomfy-RTS controller device that manages Somfy RTS shades via radio.

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the ESPSomfy-RTS device.

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: HTTP port of the ESPSomfy-RTS device.

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: Password
parameter.description: PIN or password if device security is enabled.

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Interval in seconds to poll the device for state updates.

thing-type.label: ESPSomfy Shade
thing-type.description: A Somfy RTS motorized shade, blind, awning, or shutter.

parameter.name: shadeId
parameter.label: Shade ID
parameter.description: The shade ID as configured on the ESPSomfy-RTS device (0-31).

thing-type.label: ESPSomfy Group
thing-type.description: A group of Somfy RTS shades that can be controlled together.

parameter.name: groupId
parameter.label: Group ID
parameter.description: The group ID as configured on the ESPSomfy-RTS device (0-15).

channel-type.label: Tilt Position
channel-type.description: Tilt angle for venetian blinds (0% = open, 100% = closed).

channel-type.label: Direction
channel-type.description: Current movement direction (-1 = opening, 0 = stopped, 1 = closing).

channel-type.label: My Position
channel-type.description: The configured favorite (My) position (-1 if not set).

channel-type.label: Command
channel-type.description: Send a virtual remote command to the shade.

channel-type.label: Sun Sensor
channel-type.description: Sun sensor state reported by the shade.

channel-type.label: Wind Sensor
channel-type.description: Wind sensor state reported by the shade.

channel-type.label: Firmware Version
channel-type.description: Firmware version of the ESPSomfy-RTS controller.
